rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into the target component implementation scope after subcomponents and connections
Preserve component type contracts in type scopes when they use only visible features
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if-then-else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators for generated contracts
generic_rules: Place assumptions and guarantees in valid scopes for the referenced features
Use only visible identifiers in component type contracts
Avoid implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts
Use concrete bounds or visible relations for input envelope assumptions and output range guarantees
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE scalar types are int, real, and bool
Integer literals and arithmetic are int
Real literals and arithmetic are real
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts
Do not use range comparisons or 0/1 equality over Boolean, enumeration-like, or opaque data ports
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers
irrelevant_topics: AGREE, annex, assume, guarantee, assign, validator, or repair
